articles.headline: Turkiye qualifies for World Cup after 24-year wait
articles.excerpt: Fans celebrated as Turkiye ended a 24-year wait to secure a spot in the 2026 World Cup.

articles.headline: Global protests condemning Israel’s new death penalty law for Palestinians
articles.excerpt: Protesters are condemning Israel's new bill that makes the death penalty the default punishment for some Palestinians.

articles.headline: Al-Sharaa says Syria to stay out of war on Iran unless attacked

articles.headline: Emergency workers search for victims of Israeli airstrikes on Beirut

articles.headline: ‘A law of death that only applies to Palestinians’

articles.headline: Judge temporarily halts Trump’s $400m White House ballroom project

articles.headline: Iran using children in security roles in war, reports and witnesses say

articles.headline: India begins counting more than a billion people in massive census

articles.headline: Italian Christmas meal tragedy turns into murder inquiry

articles.headline: 'My six-year-old has nosebleeds': Chiang Mai air pollution sparks health…

articles.headline: Nigeria warns its citizens in South Africa to be cautious after march…

articles.headline: Tuanzebe sends DR Congo back to World Cup after 52 years

articles.headline: Sexual violence part of 'everyday life' in parts of Sudan, charity says
articles.excerpt: Victims describe how they have been targeted while carrying out everyday activities.

articles.headline: 48-hour curfew imposed after attack on bar in Nigerian city

articles.headline: Nigerian president's rivals get major boost as political heavyweight joins…

articles.headline: Zelensky says allies asked him to scale back attacks on Russian energy
articles.excerpt: Ukraine's president says partners asked if the attacks could be "reduced" as prices soar due to the Iran war.

articles.headline: Wolf bites woman in shock German attack on busy Hamburg shopping street
articles.excerpt: It is believed to be the first wolf attack on a human since the animals began to reestablish themselves in Germany decades ago.

articles.headline: Russian military plane crash kills 29 in Crimea
articles.excerpt: Russian authorities say a technical malfunction caused the An-26 to crash into a cliff.

articles.headline: Huge fires at Russian oil facilities following Ukraine strikes, satellite…

articles.headline: Kosovo in euphoria as they dream of World Cup history

articles.headline: Pay rise for 2.7 million people as minimum wage increase comes into force

articles.headline: Asia stocks jump after Trump suggests Iran war could end in weeks
articles.excerpt: The price of Brent crude oil to be delivered in May rose by a record 64% in March as the conflict disrupted energy supplies.

articles.headline: Bitcoin, stocks soar as markets respond to chance of US and Israel-Iran…
articles.excerpt: Bitcoin held gains above $68,000 as investors leaned into news that the US and Iran were ideating ways to end the war. Will markets hold their newfound bullishness?

articles.excerpt: Bitcoin rallied to $68,000 as markets responded positively to the prospect of the US and Israel-Iran war ending, but data shows futures traders are not convinced.

articles.headline: Bitcoin traders forecast short-term downside even as BTC price chases $68K
articles.excerpt: Analysts expect Bitcoin’s price consolidation to tilt toward $60,000, but technical charts favor a liquidation rally toward $82,000.

articles.headline: Crypto awareness tops 80% among young people in UK: Coinbase survey

articles.excerpt: BTC price will find it difficult to establish a new record high if Bitcoin developers don't take the quantum threats seriously, one analyst says.

articles.excerpt: Bitcoin trapped late buyers at $68,000 with oil still above $100 ahead of a news briefing by US Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth.

articles.headline: Solana DEX volumes drop to 2024 lows: Will SOL hold $80 as support?

articles.headline: Ethereum Foundation accelerates 70,000 ETH staking plan after BitMine sale

articles.headline: Texas Lt. Gov. lists crypto, prediction markets in charges for lawmakers

articles.headline: Russia moves to narrow crypto trading to regulated intermediaries

articles.headline: Crypto exchange KuCoin agrees to $500K settlement, ending CFTC case
articles.excerpt: KuCoin’s parent will pay $500,000 to settle CFTC charges following a separate $300 million penalty in a DOJ case over similar conduct.

articles.headline: Dubai sets formal rules for crypto exchange-traded derivatives

articles.headline: Hong Kong hasn’t issued a single HKD stablecoin license after March target
articles.excerpt: Officials flagged March for initial approvals, but licensing has yet to begin with no updated timeline

articles.headline: What's next after bitcoin's historic underperformance stretch against…

articles.headline: The post-quantum transition can’t be postponed any longer

articles.headline: The time for clear financial privacy rules is now

articles.headline: Anthropic Accidentally Leaked Claude Code's Source—The Internet Is Keeping…
articles.excerpt: Claude Code exposed: Anthropic is scrambling to contain the leak, but the AI coding agent is spreading far and wide and being picked apart.
